name: Sierra Space

overview.value: Sierra Space is a privately held aerospace and space technologies company headquartered in Louisville, Colorado, established as an independent commercial space company in April 2021. It is developing the Dream Chaser spaceplane, selected by NASA to provide International Space Station resupply services under Commercial Resupply Services 2, and its Destinations organization is developing the LIFE habitat and the Orbital Reef space station in partnership with Blue Origin.

focus.value: Aerospace and space technologies: Dream Chaser spaceplane, LIFE space station habitats, and propulsion/subsystems

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
